column1: # Concentration profile of the malt-extract media defined in Malt_extract_media.docx
# Recipe (per 500 mL water): 2.5 g malt extract
# Working concentrations in prepared media: 5.00 g/L malt extract
# Decomposition into the irreducible set of molecular feeds (free monomers / ions / gases)
#   - Malt extract: composition typical of BD Bacto / Difco malt extract (barley-derived):
#       protein/amino-N ~5% w/w (hydrolyzed here to free AAs using barley-protein AA distribution)
#       trace B-vitamins and inositol/choline carried from malt
#   - Peptone: pancreatic digest of casein-type (Bacto Peptone):
#       free amino acid + small peptide pool ~80% w/w (treated as fully hydrolyzed to free AAs
#   - Water solvent treated as 55.5 M; gases at 25 deg C
# All concentrations refer to the prepared media (g/L and mM in the 5 g/L malt + 1.25 g/L peptone broth).
# Values are estimates - lot-to-lot variation 10-30% is expected for malt extract and peptone.
